calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-04-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, February 4, 2016 in Department 525:
Philip S. Keith, Esq.,((415)433-1790, Specially appearance for Respondents/Plaintiffs Travis Dawson and Rosemary Dawson whom are also present.
Sergio Picazo, Appellant/Defendant appears as Propria Persona and Carolina Picazo who is not present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Travis Dawson testifies on his own behalf under direct examination of Mr. Keith and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (A) - lease agreement, 7/16/2015 e-mail, 9/28/2015 e-mail,

Appellant/Defendant, Sergio Picazo testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Not Marked Exhibit - Pictures in cell phone,

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly marked evidence is retained.

Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-01-2015 Judgment Entered
